title: Docking Bay 629
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Noncanon|legends=1}}
[[File:DockingBay629.jpg|thumb|250px|Docking Bay 629]]
'''Docking Bay 629''' was a [[Hangar/Legends|docking bay]] in the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] that contained the [[Tydirium/Legends|''Tydirium'']].

==Appearances==
*[[Tag & Bink Are Dead 1|''Tag & Bink Are Dead'' 1]]
*[[Tag & Bink Are Dead 2|''Tag & Bink Are Dead'' 2]]
